mechanics.excerpt: The jump pack expends points of fuel per ten meters flown; with minimun of 10 points expended per turn: Verigraph This is perhaps the most advanced security device uper ation: attaches to electronic documents ad makes impos sible for someone other than the intended recipient to access the data The verigraph itself is thin chip that scans the DNA of the person trying to access the information is guarding this scan matches the stored DNA signature that was burned" into its circuitry; the verigraph will allow access; person trying to break into the data can bypass the verigraph he possess- es the appropriate training; which why such information is usually encrypted as well.
